title: UI parity & UX hardening
tagline: Port all five tabs with behavior parity, then fix silent validation, delete confirm, a11y, and PWA manifest.
risk: Medium — share canvas and WhatsApp paste are easy to regress; data key must remain stable
headline: Port Today / Leaderboard / Add / Share / Backup onto the typed domain. Fold both audits’ UX list: silent saves, delete without confirm, incomplete PWA, a11y (user-scalable=no), import caps, replace-casing, canvas as second UI. Keep download fallback first-class for iOS share flakiness.

decisions.q: When to delete legacy root app.js / dual trees
decisions.help: Safe only after a phone parity checklist against existing localStorage data.

options.label: Delete legacy files after parity checklist signed off (recommended)
Move to legacy/ for one release, then delete

decisions.q: Service worker / offline in this plan
decisions.help: Both audits warn: SW + GH Pages subpath is a common footgun. Installable manifest is enough for v1.

options.label: Add vite-plugin-pwa with careful update strategy

decisions.q: Player display name when re-entering same id
decisions.help: Current code keeps original casing forever (app.js:173). Second audit flagged this.

options.label: Always take the newly typed name
